pi_items.source: setup_task.sh (line 35) and direct_db_setup.sh (line 93) SQL INSERT statements create schools record with title='Demo School'
setup_task.sh (line 35) INSERT statement sets reporting_gp_scale = 4.00; direct_db_setup.sh (line 93) also confirms 4.0 initial value
task.json description (line 5) specifies changing to 5.00; export_result.sh (line 31) confirms target_gpa_scale='5.00'
GitHub OpenSIS v9.2 schema: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OS4ED/openSIS-Classic/master/install/OpensisSchemaMysqlInc.sql - confirmed CREATE TABLE schools exists
GitHub OpenSIS v9.2 schema confirms reporting_gp_scale numeric(10,3) column exists in schools table

privileged_info_summary: OpenSIS v9.2 Student Information System task targeting the schools table. The 'Demo School' record has a reporting_gp_scale column (numeric type) initialized to 4.0 via SQL insert in setup_task.sh and direct_db_setup.sh. The task requires updating this value to 5.0 via the web UI at http://localhost/opensis/. Database credentials are opensis_user/opensis_password_123. The verifier checks three criteria: database service running (10 pts), value changed from initial (30 pts), and final value equals 5.0 (60 pts) for a total of 100 points to pass.
